column2: transcript
Respondents cast a total of 9 votes. 6 of them voted for the third step of the ladder. This indicates that females of this village have power & freedom to make some major life decisions.
Your ability to take decisions depends upon how responsible you are
We have to consult our parents in every decision we take
It is possible that every decision taken by our parents may not be right
We can take decisions related to our education
But if we want to start a business we need their permission
We will have to convince them and then it will not be a problem
If I am in love with someone and want to marry her then I will have to persuade my parents to agree
We cannot do everything without asking our parents
It all depends on our behavior and maturity
We need to be educated today; even a famer needs to be educated
We need to be educated to start a business, to get a private/government job
We need to be educated to be respected in society
It is easier to get a job if we are well educated
There is lot of difference in educated and uneducated person
We can become independent if we are educated
We will also get more dowry if we are educated
A doctor will like to marry a doctor and not a laborer
Most boys and girls in this village study till class 12.
Both should at least complete their graduation
They should also have some technical training
They should also prepare for Staff Service Commission and bank officers exam
Women have reservation in government jobs
Technical training helps in getting a private job
Yes, parents are equally dedicated to the education of their sons and daughters
That is because parents are more aware now of the importance of education
No, parents are not partial to their sons
But, yet some parents send their sons to private school and daughters to government schools
No one drives tractor now
Most boys can do all agricultural activities- sowing, spraying pesticides, watering etc
We can grow wheat, paddy mustard and peas on our own
Only 5% of the village girls work; these girls are poor and have to work to make a living
Those from financially better families only help their mothers at home
Reasons for boys ending education
Poverty, illiterate parents, and early marriage
the two most important reasons  that boysend their education.
Poverty
Illiteracy of parents
I had always wanted to do business and by Godĺs grace and my parents support I am running a good business now
We all have aim in life but that doesnĺt always fructify
We all want government job but then have to settle for a private job
We all have a dream but start looking for second option when we realize that our dream may not become a reality
Most young men have migrated to cities and are doing private job
Some are doing agriculture here while some have a business
We should all do either a job or start our own business
New practices or technologies or information/knowledge
áZero tiller, Rotavator, Cultivator, Combine, Motor pump, Hybrid seeds, Fertilizers like D.A.P.áá
Two most important for men
Zero tiller
Hybrid seeds
Two most important for women
Zero tiller
Combine
Zero tiller aerates the soil while seeding so that seeds sown too deep also germinate whereas when we prepare land with rotavator and then sow the deeply seeded ones die
Zero tiller requires less water and gives higher yield
Zero tiller gives 20-22 quintal per acre while rotavator gives 18 quintal per acre
Zero tiller helps sow and fertilize at the same time; seeding happens in enat rows which look beautiful
Hybrid seeds can better withstand inclement weather like a storm and production is also greater
Chapatis made of hybrid seed wheat flour taste better
No, young women donĺt have the same learning opportunities as the young men since the former are busy with household work
Most young girls donĺt do agricultural work excluding those from financially weaker sections of the society
Important wheat innovation for men Now
Zero tiller, Hybrid seeds, Combine
Important wheat innovation  for men 10 years ago
Tractor, Very few hybrid seeds were available a decade ago; now we have many more
Now we produce more for same investment cost
Machines have reduced are labor cost
Farming is becoming mechanized
Farming methods have changed now, for example we spray medicines to control weeding
Earlier women did weeding and harvesting while men did land tilling and sowing
Now men also do harvesting
Women will not be able to do it on their own
But they can get it done ľ they will employ labor and get it done
Girls will not run around to find right rates while boys will do it and sell at the best price.
Boys can do it ľ most of us know all activities
We can seek our parentĺs help too
Boys can run around for help
We can do it; that is how we will learn
Normally there is a joint plot
Sometimes brothers have different plots and they are responsible for their own plot
All family members help each other
Women also do their bit especially if husbands are busy with some work
Women also help if there is too much work
Usually family members in a joint family cooperate with each other to grow a good crop since that is our main source of livelihood; if someone has separated from the family then no one will help him
Usually father and elder brother decide who will do what work
Men and women in a family donĺt have separate plots
Men buy plots in their wivesĺ names since by doing so they save on registration expenses
She will ask her husband and other elders in the family
She will usually consult her husband first
She will also ask those who may have already plant this crop
Men also take the opinion of older and more experienced family members
They may also seek help from the block office
They will also ask their friends
It depends on what this group is like; if the husband thinks that the group and it members are good and so his wife will benefit then he will let her join
It will depend on what the group is doing and who all are its members
No woman will suggest that her husband let her sell vegetables
But if they do then men will not allow them
If husband is busy he may send his neighbor to sell the produce but in no case will he allow his wife to go
If some woman defies her husband and goes to sell then he will have nothing to do with her
There may be some exceptions but in general husbands donĺt allow their wives to go sell in the market
Yes, he will ask for less help from her
In fact he will understand that his wife has too much work and may just offer to help her
If wife has some free time then she will herself help him without him having to ask
Yes, Maryĺs reputation will definitely be affected and people will comment that in spite of having husband and other elders at home she is stepping out to work
People will also blame the guardian at home for allowing her to work
The elders in the family will give him a tight slap to bring him back to his senses
How can he sit at home and allow his wife to work
His parents will also take him to task
People will say he is a good for nothing husband and will ridicule him
If wife is of a good character and is running her business well then he will be happy for her and encourage her
Mark will be happy with her success
Men and women should have same opportunities in education and job
Men should do what they can and women should do what they can
We should not look at women condescendingly
There should be gender equality in marriage too; both boys and girls should be consulted and their opinions valued
Dowry is fine but one should not become greedy
After a girl gets married she should regard her husbandĺs family as her family
As for the rest (everything else) gender equality is good
Husband and wife discuss and decide
But usually the woman takes such decisions since she feeds her family and best knows its consumption needs
Women take this decision
David will sell as men do outside work while women work at home
Yes, he will let Diana implement these changes provided she has all the technical information
He will agree to make these changes so long as they have all the technical knowledge
1 participant voted for Easy
5 participants voted for Neither Easy nor difficult
3 participants voted for Difficult
They will have to reach a compromise by mutual understanding
If he is an alcoholic then he will ignore his wife and buy his bike
But it is her fatherĺs money and so she will fight tooth and nail to buy land
3 participants voted for Very Easy
5 participants voted for neither Easy nor difficult
1 participant voted for Difficult
Since it is his fatherĺs money therefore the man will buy the bike he wants
It will not be easy because his wife will resist and he will find it hard to convince her; but in the end he will buy a bike
He will manage to convince his wife to let him buy bike
They will each try to impress what they think is essential for the family
Yes, a young woman can walk comfortably alone to the market
If her character is good then she will have no problem
She can go if she has a reason for going to the market; but there is no reason to go to the market without any work
A newly married woman will herself not go alone to the market
Her family will also not allow her
This is primarily because of age old traditions and not because of any security concerns
It will not be difficult for women to sell in the local market but they will never get permission from their family
Local market is not that far and they will get reasonable rates too but their family will not let them go
Only those women who donĺt have any men at home go to sell in the local market
They cannot move around at night
They can go if they have some work
But there is no security concern as such since every man in the community is uncle, grandfather or related in some way
She can easily move around
30%-40% men migrate for work and so it is not difficult
But they face problems especially if they go without having any prior contacts at that place
It will be difficult to find an accommodation; it may be equally difficult to get a job
Those who return will have to settle down here with whatever opportunities are available here
If they have returned with money then they can start a business else they will have to do farming
They will have to do whatever work they can find here
If he has returned with savings then his folks will be happy and will encourage him to start a business
Girls get married at 18-19 and boys at 22-25
There is no polygamy in our village
Our parents/guardians take marriage related decisions
If someone has a love marriage he is thrown out of the community
Our parents are more experienced and they should take such decisions
But there is no harm in asking us since we are the ones who will marry
In our village women become mothers after 20
Yes, this is the right age
If they are old enough to marry at 18-19 then they are physically and mentally mature enough to have a baby at 20
If you delay having a baby then people start talking and call you infertile
20 is the right age for a woman to have her first baby
Women discuss and give their opinion on these matters
But they cannot take final decision
We should all have government job; life would be good then
We should all have good jobs, whether in government or private, and we should all have opportunities and facilities to prosper
We should all study well and progress in life
We donĺt want to do farming since it is very demanding and there are no returns; farming would be our last option and only if there was nothing else for us to do
We make the society which will develop and prosper only if we do well
